member.name: T:SharpGuard.Sca.Models.OsvQueryRequest
member.summary: Request body for the OSV.dev query API.

member.name: M:SharpGuard.Sca.Models.OsvQueryRequest.#ctor(SharpGuard.Sca.Models.OsvPackageInfo,System.String)
member.summary: Request body for the OSV.dev query API.

member.name: T:SharpGuard.Sca.Models.OsvPackageInfo
member.summary: Identifies a package within an ecosystem.

member.name: M:SharpGuard.Sca.Models.OsvPackageInfo.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Identifies a package within an ecosystem.

member.name: T:SharpGuard.Sca.Models.OsvQueryResponse
member.summary: Response from the OSV.dev query API.

member.name: M:SharpGuard.Sca.Models.OsvQueryResponse.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.List{SharpGuard.Sca.Models.OsvVulnerability})
member.summary: Response from the OSV.dev query API.

member.name: T:SharpGuard.Sca.Models.OsvVulnerability
member.summary: A single OSV vulnerability entry.

member.name: M:SharpGuard.Sca.Models.OsvVulnerability.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{SharpGuard.Sca.Models.OsvSeverity})
member.summary: A single OSV vulnerability entry.

member.name: T:SharpGuard.Sca.Models.OsvSeverity
member.summary: CVSS or other severity score for a vulnerability.

member.name: M:SharpGuard.Sca.Models.OsvSeverity.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: CVSS or other severity score for a vulnerability.

member.name: T:SharpGuard.Sca.Models.PackageReference
member.summary: Represents a NuGet package reference extracted from a .csproj file.

member.name: M:SharpGuard.Sca.Models.PackageReference.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Represents a NuGet package reference extracted from a .csproj file.

member.name: P:SharpGuard.Sca.Models.PackageReference.Name
member.summary: Package name, e.g. "Newtonsoft.Json".

member.name: P:SharpGuard.Sca.Models.PackageReference.Version
member.summary: Requested version string, e.g. "13.0.1".

member.name: P:SharpGuard.Sca.Models.PackageReference.ProjectPath
member.summary: Path to the .csproj file.

member.name: T:SharpGuard.Sca.Models.VulnerabilityResult
member.summary: Aggregated result for a package vulnerability check.
member.param: List of vulnerabilities found for this package.
Where the data came from (fresh API call, cache, or offline fallback).

member.name: M:SharpGuard.Sca.Models.VulnerabilityResult.#ctor(SharpGuard.Sca.Models.PackageReference,System.Collections.Generic.List{SharpGuard.Sca.Models.OsvVulnerability},SharpGuard.Sca.Models.CacheSource)
member.summary: Aggregated result for a package vulnerability check.
member.param: List of vulnerabilities found for this package.
Where the data came from (fresh API call, cache, or offline fallback).

member.name: P:SharpGuard.Sca.Models.VulnerabilityResult.Package
member.summary: The package that was checked.

member.name: P:SharpGuard.Sca.Models.VulnerabilityResult.Vulnerabilities
member.summary: List of vulnerabilities found for this package.

member.name: P:SharpGuard.Sca.Models.VulnerabilityResult.Source
member.summary: Where the data came from (fresh API call, cache, or offline fallback).

member.name: T:SharpGuard.Sca.Models.CacheSource
member.summary: Indicates the origin of vulnerability data.

member.name: F:SharpGuard.Sca.Models.CacheSource.Fresh
member.summary: Data was fetched live from the OSV API.

member.name: F:SharpGuard.Sca.Models.CacheSource.Cached
member.summary: Data was served from the local cache.

member.name: F:SharpGuard.Sca.Models.CacheSource.Offline
member.summary: No network was available; cached data was used.

member.name: T:SharpGuard.Sca.Services.FileBasedVulnerabilityCache
member.summary: JSON file-based cache for OSV vulnerability data. Files are stored in ~/.sharpguard/cache/ with a TTL of 24 hours.

member.name: M:SharpGuard.Sca.Services.FileBasedVulnerabilityCache.#ctor
member.summary: Creates a cache in the default location (~/.sharpguard/cache).

member.name: M:SharpGuard.Sca.Services.FileBasedVulnerabilityCache.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a cache in the specified directory.

member.name: T:SharpGuard.Sca.Services.IOsvClient
member.summary: Client for the OSV.dev vulnerability database API.

member.name: M:SharpGuard.Sca.Services.IOsvClient.QueryPackageAsync(SharpGuard.Sca.Models.PackageReference,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Queries the OSV.dev API for vulnerabilities in a specific package version.
member.returns: The API response, or null if the request failed.

member.name: T:SharpGuard.Sca.Services.IPackageVulnerabilityService
member.summary: Orchestrates package vulnerability analysis: parse → deduplicate → query → aggregate.

member.name: M:SharpGuard.Sca.Services.IPackageVulnerabilityService.AnalyzePackagesAsync(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Analyzes all NuGet packages in a project/solution for known vulnerabilities.
member.param: If true, only use cached data (no network calls).

member.name: T:SharpGuard.Sca.Services.IProjectParser
member.summary: Parses .NET project files to extract NuGet package references.

member.name: M:SharpGuard.Sca.Services.IProjectParser.ParsePackages(System.String)
member.summary: Extracts all NuGet package references from the given project or solution.

member.name: T:SharpGuard.Sca.Services.IVulnerabilityCache
member.summary: Local cache for OSV vulnerability data to avoid repeated API calls.

member.name: M:SharpGuard.Sca.Services.IVulnerabilityCache.TryGet(System.String,System.String,SharpGuard.Sca.Models.OsvQueryResponse@)
member.summary: Attempts to retrieve a cached vulnerability response.

member.name: M:SharpGuard.Sca.Services.IVulnerabilityCache.Set(System.String,System.String,SharpGuard.Sca.Models.OsvQueryResponse)
member.summary: Stores a vulnerability response in the cache.

member.name: T:SharpGuard.Sca.Services.OsvClient
member.summary: OSV.dev API client. Handles rate limiting, timeouts, and JSON deserialization.

member.name: M:SharpGuard.Sca.Services.OsvClient.#ctor(System.Net.Http.HttpClient)
member.summary: Creates a new OSV client with the given .

member.name: T:SharpGuard.Sca.Services.PackageVulnerabilityService
member.summary: Orchestrates SCA analysis: parses project references, queries OSV.dev (or cache), and returns aggregated vulnerability results.

member.name: M:SharpGuard.Sca.Services.PackageVulnerabilityService.#ctor(SharpGuard.Sca.Services.IProjectParser,SharpGuard.Sca.Services.IOsvClient,SharpGuard.Sca.Services.IVulnerabilityCache)
member.summary: Creates the service with its dependencies.

member.name: T:SharpGuard.Sca.Services.ProjectParser
member.summary: Parses .csproj files to extract PackageReference elements. Handles solution files by enumerating all referenced .csproj projects.
